title: Fragonard, The Swing
description: This quiz is for the video Fragonard, The Swing.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fragonard's *The Swing* reflects the [[☃ dropdown 1]] that characterized the French aristocracy  in the years before the Revolution.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3e67f4da00590b4a6b53d6567669f010.png)
hints: **This painting reflects the indulgence that characterized the French aristocracy  in the years before the Revolution.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is NOT true of Fragonard's *The Swing*?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3e67f4da00590b4a6b53d6567669f010.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **Fragonard sets the scene in a misty and lush overgrown garden behind a villa to reinforce the sensuality of the subject.**

choices.content: The frilly luxury of the woman's clothes and her mischievous and playful demeanor are the central focus that pull our eye into the image.
Fragonard depicts a scene of scandal and flirtation, suggesting a secret love affair between the woman and the young man hidden in the bushes.
The surrounding sculptures allude to secret love and the amorous playfulness of the scene.
Fragonard sets the scene in a misty and lush overgrown garden behind a villa to reinforce the seriousness of the subject.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Diderot and other Enlightenment thinkers rebelled against the frivolous lifestyle and pleasure-seeking of the ruling classes, which is depicted in Rococo art.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **The ideas of the Enlightenment were very different from those of the ruling classes that patronized Rococo art.**
